entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Explain derivatives step by step"
"Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Eman bertsio zailago bat nik saiatu ondoren."

entries.source: "Help with quadratic equations"
"Keep it beginner friendly."
"Solve 2x + 5 = 17 with me"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Erabili nire azterketako, proiektuko edo eguneroko bizitzako adibideak."

entries.source: AI prompts
Ask for a tiny first task.
End with a recap you write yourself.
For Math Step Coach, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Math Step Coach-rako praktika-ziklo erabilgarria hau da:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Modu honetarako, lana sinplea da: landu aljebra, kalkulua, hitz-problemak eta matematikako kontzeptuak urrats bakoitzean AI coach batekin.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Prompt onek normalean hiru gauza dituzte: gaia, zure egungo maila eta nahi duzun laguntza mota. Ez duzu formulazio perfekturik behar. Saioa hasteko adina testuinguru besterik ez duzu behar.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Erantzuna zabalegia iruditzen bazaizu, estutu. Eskatu adibide bat, uste oker bat, egiaztapen-galdera bat edo hurrengo urrats bat. Errazegia bada, eskatu erronka bat. Zaila bada, eskatu dagoeneko dakizunetik zubi bat.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
Math Step Coach prompts and study loop
entries.value: Math Step Coach promptak eta ikasketa-zikloa

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Math Step Coach on inspir.
entries.value: inspir-en Math Step Coach erabiliz ikaskuntza-emaitza erabilgarriak lortzeko prompt ideiak eta ikasketa-ziklo errepikagarria.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI erantzun bat irakurtzea ez da ikastea bera. Lehen erantzunaren ondoren, eskatu moduari ideiarekin zerbait eginarazteko.

entries.source: Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Eskatu feedbacka ziurra sentitu ez den zatiari buruz.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
study skills
That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Azken laburpen hori garrantzitsua da. Ideia berriro azaltzen duzunean, zer den sendoa eta zer dagoen oraindik AIari mailegatuta erakusten duzu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Fluxuak urrats bakoitza egiaztatzen du, hutsak seinalatzen ditu eta prozedurak berriro kontzeptura lotzen ditu.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Math Step Coach is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Math Step Coach-etik balioa lortzeko modurik azkarrena AIari ikaskuntza-lan bat ematea da, ez gai bat bakarrik. Gai batek zer interesatzen zaizun esaten du. Ikaskuntza-lan batek zer laguntza mota behar duzun esaten du.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Gero gehitu saioa pertsonalago egiten duen muga bat:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Math Step Coach when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Homework Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Math Step Coach lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Homework Coach. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.
